title: Tile's Potion Infusions
description:
Hi so like
this is my cool epic mod, it's basicly an expansion to the alchemy currently present in the game
body:
**TILE’S POTION INFUSIONS**

Additions:

- **POTION INFUSED BUCKETS**![buckets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/412d48ca93b72308081d748d3253fdb4be4fbe63.png)
Potion infused buckets are basically buckets that hold certain effects, Those effects being Fire Resistance, Invisibility, Jump Boost, Night Vision, Regeneration, Slow Falling, Strength, Swiftness & Water Breathing!
These effects (if drank from a bucket) last for 30 minutes and give the basic level of effect

- **POTION INFUSED INGOTS**![ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f79107402c1bd8213484e917355ad82d07d49137.png)
Iron and gold ingots are now infused with potion effects!
These are mainly used for recipes
They are made 4 of gold/iron ingot and 1 potion infused bucket

- **POTION INFUSED ARMOR (gold/iron)**![armor (iron/gold)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370d9352a3900270826a72566d123ab37e12e3fc.png)
Finally an actual useful part of the mod!
These armor sets are crafted from the potion infused ingots, and the recipes look exactly the same as the regular armor set recipes, just replaced with said ingots
A singular armor piece gives a basic level of effect of whatever ingots you used PERMANENTLY, the fun part about this is that you can have a max of 4 effects at the same time using the different ingots to make different armor pieces!

- **INNER CORE**![inner core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27a37e29f3630973c5d78efdb7a5a02c6e762015.png)
An inner core! Made from 4 iron ingots, 2 gray dye, 2 stone and a glass pane
These inner cores are used to make one item named “Diamond (Core)”
Combining 1 diamond with 1 inner core makes the item mentioned above

- **POTION INFUSED DIAMONDS**![diamonds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0937248a03940811ea0aac9b7df2422247e1c4d8.png)
Using the so called Diamond (core), you can make Potion Infused diamonds of whatever effect you like!
As you can guess, these are made to make more

- **POTION INFUSED ARMOR (diamond/netherite)**![armor (diamond/netherite)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d99a4f21b8236cd6dcbf3bf009f52412218aca9d.png)
Using the potion infused diamonds, You can make Potion Infused Diamond armor!
They work just like the potion infused iron/gold armor, except it gives you an effect level of 2!
You can upgrade this diamond armor using a netherite upgrade and a netherite ingot to make Potion Infused Netherite armor, its gives the exact same effects as diamonds, but its as strong as netherite

- **AMALGAMATION**![amalgamation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b0976663d80825f13698c2571beaefc94c0642.png) 
Please dont make this, its made from 8 of the potion infused buckets (all except water breathing bc screw water breathing) and an empty bucket, 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This item does nothing but end your hardcore worlds, don't drink it bru

</details>


Yea so like thats all this mod has to offer, 

**PART 2 COMING SOON**                                                                            
                                                                                                         
 (if you wish to use this mod in a video go for it, just credit me pretty plz, and NEVER claim this mod was made by you because only tiletric can make tile's potion infusions)
